p:cNvPr.name: Picture 2
p:cNvPr.descr: DalFort Capital Partners ("DFCP") Announces Sale of United Enertech, to Soler & Palau Ventilation, Inc. ("S&P")

a:r.a:t: DalFort Capital is a Dallas-based private investment firm with >$256mm of aggregate deal volume specializing in control investments in lower middle market companies. We focus on fragmented industries, driving growth through strategic add-ons and operational excellence. Our collaborative approach unlocks hidden value, strengthens management teams, and maximizes long-term success.
